prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UTCBKFRT-17PC-SML-BLCK Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Cleaning Brush 17pc Kit for Rotary Tools Description: The 17pc Universal Tool Wire Brush Cleaning Kit is the ideal cleaning companion for your rotary tool. This kit includes many different shapes, sizes and bristle styles to help get your project done right.

Each set comes with 17 high quality wire brushes in assorted sizes to match any cleaning project you are working on. These bristle brushes are great for cleaning rust and removing paint, rust, and grime on your project. All wire brush bits have a 1/8" shank allowing them to be compatible with almost any rotary tools.

This makes a great gift for DIY-er in your life. Search Terms: cleaning brush tool kit handheld rotary gifts for dad Features: - Rotary Cleaning Brush Kit 17pc Assorted Cleaning Brushes - Shank Size: 1/8" - Will fit most all rotary tools and Dremel brand === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 17pc Cleaning Brush Kit for Rotary Tools
